CustomField.formula: "&solmgr=1" + "&username=" + $User.Username + "&id=" + Id + "&queryid=[QuoteLineRenewal]0Q_026MAQ975089,[RenewalLetter]0Q_030MAQ331479,[StaticRenewal]0Q_174MAQ153500,[SelectRenewal]0Q_175MAQ769671" + "&templateid=0T_071MAQ089302" + "&fp0=1" + "&ac1=Renewal Invoice Document Generated" + "&sc0=1" + "&sc1=SalesforceFile" + "&ofn=Renewal Invoice for " + Renewal_Quote__r.SBQQ__Account__r.IntApp_Account_Number__c + " - " + TEXT(TODAY()) + "&ac0=1" + "&TemplateGroup=ProformaInvoice" + "&xdo=CIA" + "&xdo2=GenerateInvoice" + "&geo=" + $User.Country + "&emailtoid=" + Renewal_Quote__r.Invoicing_Contact__r.Id + "&congaemailtemplateid=0E_003EAU884391" + "&qmode=SendEmail"
CustomField.label: Proforma Invoice Document
